languages.text: Когда зрение прояснилось, место, в котором мы находились, было совершенно иным. Без сомнений, мы находились в Музеоне, и вид его торжественных залов, разрушенных орбитальной бомбардировкой, наполнил мое сердце мстительной радостью. До того, чтобы сполна отомстить вору, посмевшему украсть {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Священный Патент{/g}, оставалось меньше одного шага. Наследни{mf|к|ца} династии фон Валанциус соверши{mf|л|ла} невозможное, пройдя в логово опаснейшего врага и оставшись невредим{mf|ым|ой}.
languages.translation_comment:
Если каунтер Скрытности 3 или больше
Бафф на ВТ и свиту (в пределах Музеона бонус к Восприятию на обнаружение засад)

traits.locale_text: Когда зрение прояснилось, место, в котором мы находились, было совершенно иным. Без сомнений, мы находились в Музеоне, и вид его торжественных залов, разрушенных орбитальной бомбардировкой, наполнил мое сердце мстительной радостью. До того, чтобы сполна отомстить вору, посмевшему украсть {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Священный Патент{/g}, оставалось меньше одного шага. Наследни{mf|к|ца} династии фон Валанциус соверши{mf|л|ла} невозможное, пройдя в логово опаснейшего врага и оставшись невредим{mf|ым|ой}.

languages.translation_comment:
Если каунтер Скрытности 3 или больше
Бафф на ВТ и свиту (в пределах Музеона бонус к Восприятию на обнаружение засад)

languages.text: When my vision returned, I found the place utterly transformed. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. We were but one step away from exacting revenge on the thief who had dared to steal the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Sacred Warrant{/g}. The heir of House von Valancius had done the impossible, entering the lair of this most dangerous foe with no harm to {mf|himself|herself}.
languages.original_text: Когда зрение прояснилось, место, в котором мы находились, было совершенно иным. Без сомнений, мы находились в Музеоне, и вид его торжественных залов, разрушенных орбитальной бомбардировкой, наполнил мое сердце мстительной радостью. До того, чтобы сполна отомстить вору, посмевшему украсть {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Священный Патент{/g}, оставалось меньше одного шага. Наследни{mf|к|ца} династии фон Валанциус соверши{mf|л|ла} невозможное, пройдя в логово опаснейшего врага и оставшись невредим{mf|ым|ой}.

traits.locale_text: When my vision returned, I found the place utterly transformed. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. We were but one step away from exacting revenge on the thief who had dared to steal the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Sacred Warrant{/g}. The heir of House von Valancius had done the impossible, entering the lair of this most dangerous foe with no harm to {mf|himself|herself}.

When my vision returned, I found the place utterly transformed. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. We were but one step away from exacting revenge on the thief who had dared to steal the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Sacred Warrant{/g}. The heir of House von Valancius had done the impossible, entering the lair of this most dangerous foe with no harm to {mf|himself|herself}.

When my vision returned, I found the place utterly transformed. The grand halls that had previously towered around us had been racked by volleys of orbital bombardment. Reality had been restored, and we were but one step away from exacting revenge on the thief who had dared to steal the Sacred Warrant. Lord Captain von Valancius had done the impossible, entering the lair of this most dangerous foe with so little fuss.

When my vision returned, I found the place utterly transformed. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. We were but one step away from exacting revenge on the thief who had dared to steal the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Sacred Warrant{/g}. The heir of House von Valancius had done the impossible, entering the lair of this most dangerous foe with no harm to {mf|himself|herself}.

When my vision returned, I found the place utterly transformed. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. We were but one step away from exacting revenge on the thief who had dared to steal the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Sacred Warrant{/g}. The heir of House von Valancius had done the impossible, entering the lair of this most dangerous foe with no harm to {mf|himself|herself}.

languages.text: 等我视力恢复，眼前已彻底变了样。毫无疑问，我们已身处陈列馆之中。那庄严肃穆，却被轨道轰击摧毁的大厅，让我心中升起复仇的快意。我们离向那个胆敢窃取{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}神圣贸易授状{/g}的人复仇，只差一步了。冯·瓦兰修斯家族的继承人化不可能为可能，竟毫发无伤地闯入了这位最危险敌人的巢穴。
languages.original_text: When my vision returned, I found the place utterly transformed. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. We were but one step away from exacting revenge on the thief who had dared to steal the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Sacred Warrant{/g}. The heir of House von Valancius had done the impossible, entering the lair of this most dangerous foe with no harm to {mf|himself|herself}.

traits.locale_text: 等我视力恢复，眼前已彻底变了样。毫无疑问，我们已身处陈列馆之中。那庄严肃穆，却被轨道轰击摧毁的大厅，让我心中升起复仇的快意。我们离向那个胆敢窃取{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}神圣贸易授状{/g}的人复仇，只差一步了。冯·瓦兰修斯家族的继承人化不可能为可能，竟毫发无伤地闯入了这位最危险敌人的巢穴。

languages.text: Cuando recuperé la visión, el lugar había cambiado por completo. No cabía duda de que estábamos ene el Museion, y ver sus solemnes salas arrasadas por el bombardeo orbital me llenó de júbilo vengativo. Estábamos a un paso de vengarnos del ladrón que se había atrevido a robar la {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}sagrada Patente{/g}. {mf|El|La} hereder{mf|o|a} de la casa von Valancius había logrado lo imposible: adentrarse iles{mf|o|a} en la guarida de este peligroso enemigo.
languages.original_text: When my vision returned, I found the place utterly transformed. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. We were but one step away from exacting revenge on the thief who had dared to steal the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Sacred Warrant{/g}. The heir of House von Valancius had done the impossible, entering the lair of this most dangerous foe with no harm to {mf|himself|herself}.

traits.locale_text: Cuando recuperé la visión, el lugar había cambiado por completo. No cabía duda de que estábamos ene el Museion, y ver sus solemnes salas arrasadas por el bombardeo orbital me llenó de júbilo vengativo. Estábamos a un paso de vengarnos del ladrón que se había atrevido a robar la {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}sagrada Patente{/g}. {mf|El|La} hereder{mf|o|a} de la casa von Valancius había logrado lo imposible: adentrarse iles{mf|o|a} en la guarida de este peligroso enemigo.

languages.text: Lorsque je retrouvai la vue, le lieu avait changé du tout au tout. Il ne faisait aucun doute que nous étions dans le Muséion, et la vue de ses salles détruites par les bombardements orbitaux m'emplit le cœur d'une joie vengeresse. Nous étions désormais à deux doigts de nous venger du voleur qui avait eu l'audace de subtiliser la {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}lettre de marque{/g}. L'{mf|héritier|héritière} von Valancius avait réalisé l'impossible : pénétrer dans l'antre de son adversaire le plus redoutable et en ressortir indemne.
languages.original_text: When my vision returned, I found the place utterly transformed. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. We were but one step away from exacting revenge on the thief who had dared to steal the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Sacred Warrant{/g}. The heir of House von Valancius had done the impossible, entering the lair of this most dangerous foe with no harm to {mf|himself|herself}.

traits.locale_text: Lorsque je retrouvai la vue, le lieu avait changé du tout au tout. Il ne faisait aucun doute que nous étions dans le Muséion, et la vue de ses salles détruites par les bombardements orbitaux m'emplit le cœur d'une joie vengeresse. Nous étions désormais à deux doigts de nous venger du voleur qui avait eu l'audace de subtiliser la {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}lettre de marque{/g}. L'{mf|héritier|héritière} von Valancius avait réalisé l'impossible : pénétrer dans l'antre de son adversaire le plus redoutable et en ressortir indemne.

languages.text: Görme yetim geri geldiğinde mekânın tamamen değiştiğini gördüm. Museion'da olduğumuza şüphe yoktu. Yörünge bombardımanıyla yok edilmiş o görkemli salonların manzarası, kalbimi intikamcı bir neşeyle doldurdu. {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Kutsal Ruhsatname'yi{/g} çalmaya cüret eden hırsızdan intikam almaya sadece bir adım uzaktaydık. Von Valancius Hanesi'nin vârisi imkânsızı başarmış, bu en tehlikeli düşmanın inine kendine hiçbir zarar gelmeden girmeyi başarmıştı.
languages.original_text: When my vision returned, I found the place utterly transformed. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. We were but one step away from exacting revenge on the thief who had dared to steal the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Sacred Warrant{/g}. The heir of House von Valancius had done the impossible, entering the lair of this most dangerous foe with no harm to {mf|himself|herself}.

traits.locale_text: Görme yetim geri geldiğinde mekânın tamamen değiştiğini gördüm. Museion'da olduğumuza şüphe yoktu. Yörünge bombardımanıyla yok edilmiş o görkemli salonların manzarası, kalbimi intikamcı bir neşeyle doldurdu. {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Kutsal Ruhsatname'yi{/g} çalmaya cüret eden hırsızdan intikam almaya sadece bir adım uzaktaydık. Von Valancius Hanesi'nin vârisi imkânsızı başarmış, bu en tehlikeli düşmanın inine kendine hiçbir zarar gelmeden girmeyi başarmıştı.

languages.text: Als ich wieder etwas sehen konnte, fand ich den Ort völlig verwandelt vor. Wir waren zweifellos im Museion, und der Anblick der von Orbitalkanonen zerstörten Hallen erfüllte mein Herz mit einer rachsüchtigen Freude. Wir waren nur noch einen Schritt davon entfernt, uns an dem Dieb zu rächen, der es gewagt hatte, den {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}heiligen Handelsbrief{/g} zu stehlen. {mf|Der Erbe|Die Erbin} des Hauses von Valancius hatte das Unmögliche getan und war ohne sich selbst zu verletzen in das Versteck dieses überaus gefährlichen Feindes marschiert.
languages.original_text: When my vision returned, I found the place utterly transformed. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. We were but one step away from exacting revenge on the thief who had dared to steal the {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Sacred Warrant{/g}. The heir of House von Valancius had done the impossible, entering the lair of this most dangerous foe with no harm to {mf|himself|herself}.

traits.locale_text: Als ich wieder etwas sehen konnte, fand ich den Ort völlig verwandelt vor. Wir waren zweifellos im Museion, und der Anblick der von Orbitalkanonen zerstörten Hallen erfüllte mein Herz mit einer rachsüchtigen Freude. Wir waren nur noch einen Schritt davon entfernt, uns an dem Dieb zu rächen, der es gewagt hatte, den {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}heiligen Handelsbrief{/g} zu stehlen. {mf|Der Erbe|Die Erbin} des Hauses von Valancius hatte das Unmögliche getan und war ohne sich selbst zu verletzen in das Versteck dieses überaus gefährlichen Feindes marschiert.

languages.text: 視界が戻ると、そこは全く別の場所になっていた。かつて我々を囲んでいた壮大な大広間は、軌道からの砲撃によって破壊されていた。現実が戻り、聖なる証書を盗んだ賊に復讐する一歩手前になっていた。バルアンシウス大佐は、最も危険な敵の巣窟に、騒ぎ一つないまま侵入した。
languages.original_text: When my vision returned, I found the place utterly transformed. The grand halls that had previously towered around us had been racked by volleys of orbital bombardment. Reality had been restored, and we were but one step away from exacting revenge on the thief who had dared to steal the Sacred Warrant. Lord Captain von Valancius had done the impossible, entering the lair of this most dangerous foe with so little fuss.

traits.locale_text: 視界が戻ると、そこは全く別の場所になっていた。かつて我々を囲んでいた壮大な大広間は、軌道からの砲撃によって破壊されていた。現実が戻り、聖なる証書を盗んだ賊に復讐する一歩手前になっていた。バルアンシウス大佐は、最も危険な敵の巣窟に、騒ぎ一つないまま侵入した。
